candidate_check.description: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must use SSH to protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the "sshd.service" is enabled and active with the following commands: 
 
$ sudo systemctl is-enabled ssh
enabled

$ sudo systemctl is-active ssh
active

If "ssh.service" is not active or loaded, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Enable the "ssh" service to start automatically on reboot with the following command: 
 
$ sudo systemctl enable ssh.service 
 
ensure the "ssh" service is running 
 
$ sudo systemctl start ssh.service
title: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS must use SSH to protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.
